name: The Account Director
effect: Maintain control of the client relationship through regular touchpoints and selective information sharing. This card is considered indispensable.

clauses.name: ESCALATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the client raises a complaint: Route it through a quarterly business review.

clauses.name: RENEWAL CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If renewal is at risk: Schedule an executive alignment call.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the client speaks directly to the delivery team: This card is immediately discarded.

witness_quote: I'll loop in my team on that.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: What would happen if they talked directly?
